description: Composition Red polo T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a tipped collar, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, half buttoned placket, embroidery on the left chest and a vented hem Fit Slim Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean Do not tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery This T-shirt from classic polo is perfect for the alpha male who wants to capture the minimal mood of the moment. This polo tee is an off-duty essential in every cosmopolitan man's wardrobe. Wear with denims and a jacket for a weekend in the outdoors, style with casual shoes and an understated belt. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18&rdquo
